effect.smc.frost.description: Freezing effect holder like in Powder Snow block.
effect.smc.frost_burst.description: Freezing effect holder like in Powder Snow block, deal Amp * 6 Magic damage after effect expired.
effect.smc.love.description: Increasing following range, force animals in love, decrease CD for next breeding.
effect.smc.rainbow.description: Provides creative flying ability, add movement speed and rainbow particle trail.
effect.smc.frost_resistance.description: Immune Frost, Frost Burst, Slowness Effect and Freezing.
effect.smc.star_light.description: Boost Magic Damage from effect holder by Amp * 50% and apply Glowing Effect to the target.
effect.smc.chop_protection.description: Using food level to substitute health when effect holder hurts, the exceed damage will hurt on your health.
effect.smc.peace.description: Mobs will not attack effect holder, unless mob immune potion effects. Effect holder will not able to attack.
enchantment.smc.damage_spell.desc: Increase the damage of spell bullet.
enchantment.smc.explode_spell.desc: Deal an explosion at the hit point of spell bullet (unable to break blocks), higher level will strengthen the explosion.
enchantment.smc.fire_spell.desc: Set a fire on block or targets, higher level will lengthen fire time
enchantment.smc.freeze_spell.desc: Set frozen on targets, higher level will lengthen frozen time
enchantment.smc.heal_spell.desc: Healing more health when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.infinite_spell.desc: Grimoire will never cost Star Dust.
enchantment.smc.protection_spell.desc: Add Resistance Effect when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.strength_spell.desc: Add Strength Effect when using heal spell.
enchantment.smc.extension_spell.desc: Extend the range of heal spell.
enchantment.smc.rapid_cooling.desc: Decrease the cool down of Grimoire.
enchantment.smc.obsidian_hitting.desc: Projectile will apply 1 second Stunned effect, but the Slingshot can only shoot obsidian as bullet.
enchantment.smc.inferno_hitting.desc: Projectile will lead a small explosion, but the Slingshot can only shoot netherrack as bullet.
enchantment.smc.ender_floating.desc: Projectile will be no gravity, but the Slingshot can only shoot end stone as bullet.
enchantment.smc.wide_range.desc: Watering Can will have larger effect area.
enchantment.smc.composite_fertilizer.des: Watering Can will effective on Nether Wart, Saplings and Sweet Berries.
enchantment.smc.life_cycle.desc: Watering Can harvest max aged crops and replant it automatically.
enchantment.smc.adaption.desc: Swiss Army Knife will automatically switch the mode.
item.smc.music_disc_laoda.desc: 牢大の小曲 - See You Again But Children
tooltip.smc.broccoli_boots: Provides Luck and Speed when equipped.
tooltip.smc.broccoli_hoe: Has chance to get Bone Meal.
tooltip.smc.broccoli_fishing_rod: Extra luck addition, has more chance to obtain random crops.
tooltip.smc.cat_paw: You smell like a cat...perhaps some creatures think so.
tooltip.smc.carrot_pickaxe: Has chance to recover your food level when breaking blocks.
tooltip.smc.golden_carrot_pickaxe: Has chance to recover your food level when breaking blocks.
tooltip.smc.golden_carrot_pickaxe_1: Providing Night Vision effect when holding.
tooltip.smc.frostium_sword: Freeze the target, deal double damage to fire immune and water sensitive entities.
tooltip.smc.frostium_axe: Deal double damage and unfreeze to frozen entities.
tooltip.smc.frostium_pickaxe: Freeze all fluid blocks near by destroyed block and has faster destroy speed on Obsidian Block.
tooltip.smc.frostium_boots: Provides Jump Boost and Powder Snow Walker when equipped.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire: RMB to shoot a spell bullet.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire_1: RMB + LSHIFT to recover all nearby friendly entities.
tooltip.smc.perkin_grimoire_2: Each spell costs a Star Dust.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_broccoli: Editable, provide Poison Resistance effect, attack with poison effect.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_frost: Editable, provide Frost Resistance effect, attack with slowness effect.
tooltip.smc.lollipop_perkin: Editable, provide Star Light effect, turns damage type to magic.
tooltip.smc.colorful_ice_cream: Editable, it has all lollipops functions.
tooltip.smc.astera_foods: Healing you equals to the nutrition provided by this food after eat.
tooltip.smc.frost_berries: Add Glowing effect to entities around you.
tooltip.smc.frostium_bow_1: Infinite enchantment will be effective on Frost Arrow.
tooltip.smc.sunflower_pot: Switch weather to clear, can place lights when crouching. Lights can be touched and broken when you holding this item.
tooltip.smc.wallnut_pot: Using it as a shield, can decrease the damage you receive, but you will be the target of every nearby mobs.
tooltip.smc.lucky_clover: It's time to show how lucky you are.
tooltip.smc.creative_clover: Can generate random items which banned in Lucky Clover.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector: Hold this item in main hand and hold the block item in off hand, right click to set the detecting target.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector_0: right click when crouching on block can also set the detecting target.
tooltip.smc.ore_detector_1: Hold this item in off hand to mark all nearby targets.
tooltip.smc.frostium_ore: Can be found in Frozen Ocean Biome.
tooltip.smc.blue_ice_frostium_ore: Can be found in Frozen Ocean Biome.
tooltip.smc.perkin_ore: Can be found in Taiga Biome.
tooltip.smc.deepslate_perkin_ore: Can be found in Taiga Biome.
tooltip.smc.watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.copper_watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.iron_watering_can: Speeding up crops growing in area, Enchantable.
tooltip.smc.archaeological_shovel: Unable to break Suspicious blocks and the block below them.
tooltip.smc.chop_shield: Consuming Food level to counteract shield disabling.
tooltip.smc.chop_kebab: Editable, Consumed food level will decrease the damage.
tooltip.smc.chicken_chop: Obtained by chicken which died from Lightning Creeper Explosion.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools: Attack with Frost Burst effect, continuing attack will increase the effect level.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools_1: Repairing itself when you healing (Round Down).
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_tools_2: Can apply most of weapon enchantments.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_bow_1: Infinite enchantment will be effective on Frost Arrow and Spectral Arrow.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_armors: Immune Poison, Hunger, Slowness and Darkness effects.
tooltip.smc.perfrostite_armors_1: Full armor sets will enable Elytra Flight Ability, immune Fire, Freeze and Falling Damage.
tooltip.smc.spore_bud: Right-click to throw, so that the range of creatures to obtain love effect, the effect can be stacked.
tooltip.smc.mini_bedrock: Hold this item in Main Hand, you'll be invincible, but unable to move and lock your view.
tooltip.smc.mini_bedrock_1: Obtained by exploding on Bedrock with extremely low chance.
tooltip.smc.vacuum_sniffer: Can attract large area of items and clear tall grass blocks, and obtain various seeds from them.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_fishing_rod: Unique fishing loot table, have chance to get multiple items when fishing.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_bow: No arrow consumption, shooting with special arrow.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_bow_1: Hitting in raining weather will release an arrow rain, thunder weather will reinforce arrow rain with lightning.
tooltip.smc.rainbow_chip: Spawn at cloud height above player after raining, spawn more after thundering. Making sure there are no blocks near by that area.
tooltip.smc.chocolate_sword: Deal more damage to Animals and apply Poison effect.
tooltip.smc.chocolate_armor: When armor consuming durability, recover same amount of food level.
tooltip.smc.end_rod_candy: Eat me, you'll understand the true meaning of end rod.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar: Converts food to pure nutrition, and feed you automatically when you're hungry.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar_1: Can consume nutrition to release random candy in empty slot.
tooltip.smc.candy_jar_2: Consume durability when feeding and releasing.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword: Can devour Sword Items to increase attack damage. Cannot devour Sword Items which had been devoured.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_1: Launch devoured sword when swinging. Each %s devoured sword will spawn 1 extra sword.
tooltip.smc.devour_sword_3: Can change weapon skin through putting this item with another item and a Star Dust in crafting table.
tooltip.smc.knife: A holy heirloom of the village
tooltip.smc.knife_2: When the blade’s point touches ground
tooltip.smc.template_shroud: Can absorb Smithing Template Items to increase armor value. Cannot absorb Smithing Template Items which had been absorbed.
tooltip.smc.template_shroud_1: Provide Absorption hearts each %s seconds, hearts number as same as absorbed templates number.
tooltip.smc.bot: Can absorb and release xp, and release xp orb to repair equipments with mending enchantment. When named in number, the released xp level will not exceed that.
tooltip.smc.bot_1: Right-click to switch repair mode, repair mode:
tooltip.smc.bot_2: SHIFT Right-click to switch xp storage mode, current mode:
